items.name: Immortal Hairs: Dreamcore Scene Hair
items.description:
Step into a surreal dreamscape with the Dreamcore Scene Hair — where pastel hues meet glowing edges and every strand hums with unreal vibes.
Designed for those who drift between realities, this hair pulses with soft light and dream energy. Whether you're ruling digital skies or wandering neon cities, your style will always stand out.

Price: 1200/10 stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/136587139737757
